item.title: Building a Multimodal Visual Similarity Pipeline Inside Oracle 26ai with CLIP ONNX Models
item.description: This article shows how Oracle practitioners can build an end-to-end multimodal visual similarity experiment inside Oracle 26ai using real HuggingFace image/text data, pre-built CLIP ViT-B/32 ONNX models, VECTOR columns, and SQL-based similarity search.

item.title: HuggingFace Datasets in Oracle 26ai: Jump-Starting CLIP Vector Search Experiments
item.description: How to go from zero data to a fully structured Oracle 26ai table, with images, text descriptions, and an empty VECTOR column, using a HuggingFace dataset, in one session, without building a data engineering pipeline.

item.title: About
item.description:
Hey I’m Hicham Assoudi.

I help Oracle practitioners, architects, developers, dbas, and enterprises make better AI implementation decisions by combining Oracle depth, real experiments, and research-grade evaluation.

I’m an Oracle consultant, AI researcher, and technical author.

My work sits at the intersection of enterprise Oracle technologies and practical artificial intelligence. I focus on topics such as Oracle Database AI, OCI Data Science, multilingual AI, and enterprise research-driven AI implementation patterns.

item.title: Books
item.description:
This page gathers my books and long-form technical writing related to Oracle technologies, artificial intelligence, and natural language processing.

Natural Language Processing on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure

A practical book on building and scaling NLP solutions on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure, with a focus on real architectures and applied enterprise use cases.

Oracle AI and Database Engineering

My more recent writing focuses on Oracle Database AI capabilities, including vector search, ONNX workflows, semantic retrieval, and implementation patterns for modern AI-enabled applications.

item.title: Building a Local Oracle Database 26ai Free Lab with Docker on Windows
item.description: A practical local setup for validating Oracle AI code, testing vector-search workflows, and building a repeatable Oracle Database 26ai Free experimentation environment on Windows with Docker.

item.title: Resources
item.description:
This page gathers selected technical resources related to my work on Oracle + AI.

Over time, it will include:

  • GitHub repositories
  • Hugging Face models and datasets
  • technical walkthroughs and videos
  • companion resources for articles
  • implementation templates and reference material

External profiles

  • GitHub
  • Hugging Face
  • LinkedIn
  • Typica.ai

item.title: Welcome to assoudi.blog
item.description: Why I launched assoudi.blog and what I will publish here.

item.title: Newsletter
item.description:
I share articles, experiments, and architecture patterns around Oracle Database 26ai, AI Vector Search, ONNX models, OCI AI, multimodal workflows, and real implementation decisions.

The blog remains the main place for long-form articles.
The newsletter is where I share new posts, experiments, and practical Oracle AI notes directly.
